title: CDC level-2 polio travel advisory: Precautions for international travellers
summary_full: Global health alerts are up for polio. The CDC warns travellers to take extra care. Poliovirus is detected in many countries. This reminds everyone the fight is not over. Pharmacists play a key role in educating travellers. They check vaccination status and advise on boosters. Staying protected is vital before international travel.
